ConnectionStrings._comment: Real value is stored in User Secrets (dev) or env var ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection (prod). Format: Host=aws-0-<region>.pooler.supabase.com;Port=6543;Database=postgres;Username=postgres.<project-ref>;Password=...;SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true

Syncfusion._comment: Real key comes from User Secrets (dev) or Secrets Manager → Syncfusion__LicenseKey (prod). Empty here so an unconfigured env never registers an invalid key.

Security._comment: RequireHttps gates UseHsts()+UseHttpsRedirection() in production. Keep false while the environment is served over plain HTTP. Set env var Security__RequireHttps=true once an HTTPS listener (ALB+ACM cert or IIS HTTPS binding) is in front of the instance.
